demographics.diagnosis: Autism Spectrum Disorder, Level 3 (requiring very substantial support)

currentSkills.communication: Non-verbal, uses leading and reaching to request. No functional words or signs.
currentSkills.social: Limited eye contact, no joint attention, prefers solitary play
currentSkills.adaptive: Requires full assistance with all self-care tasks (feeding, dressing, toileting)
currentSkills.behavior: Frequent tantrums (10-15 per day) when denied access to preferred items, hand flapping when excited

priorityAreas: Communication — ability to request wants and needs

learningProfile.attentionSpan: 2-3 minutes with preferred activities, <30 seconds with non-preferred

familyContext.parentAvailability: Committed and available for parent training
familyContext.siblings: Younger sibling (18 months) in the home
